full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #21 (2026-05-04)

PULSE
Health: 0.4873 (C). 899 wallets, 158 contributors. 42 memos today vs 131 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
44 reward payments, 274217 PFT distributed to 21 contributors. Top earner: rHWKHD...u2yC (55750 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 17,900 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (9,400 PFT). Lowest: r4ahFv...5XyU (8,500 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (75,400 PFT, avg 9,425/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): r4RPpe...WghS (50 memos). 7 new wallet(s) this week. 30 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 81.5%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-04): 7669 transactions from 70 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA
